Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 13 10 5 1}I chatted with Maya for a while.[n]The bond between us is growing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки[n]стануть міцнішими скоро...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out[n]and leave my room.[n]{f 1 1}
